svg.text: Разпределена вградена система за термично управление на ЦД
Distributed Embedded Datacenter Thermal Control System — Raspberry Pi 5 | Hardware & Software Architecture
ARM Cortex-A76 · 4 GB LPDDR4X · Raspberry Pi OS 64-bit · Python 3.11
REST API (port 8000) · WebSocket /ws · CORS · Static Files (React build)
GET /api/status POST /api/fan POST /api/valve POST /api/mode GET /api/history POST /api/simulation WS /ws
MANUAL mode: REST API / MQTT commands | Airflow-fault override | Threshold API
React Dashboard (GUI/dist — served as static files)
Vite 5 · React 18 · Recharts · Axios · WebSocket hook
SensorGauges · FanControl · ValveControl · AirflowStatus · ModeToggle · HistoricalChart · SimulationPanel
Modbus RTU RS-485 Relay Module (Slave ID: 1 · 9600 baud · /dev/ttyUSB0)
Real-time gauges · Fan control · Valve control · Simulation mode
Shared broker · Remote command via cmd/ topics
